title: Delivery charge
answer: Dhaka city delivery charge is BDT 80. Outside Dhaka delivery charge is BDT 130.

title: Cash on delivery
answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available across Bangladesh.

title: Return policy
answer: Customers can request an exchange within 3 days if the product is damaged or the wrong item was delivered.

title: Delivery time
answer: Inside Dhaka delivery usually takes 1-2 days. Outside Dhaka usually takes 2-4 days.
